prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次依次约6693→4890→4494→12571→4541名。2021–2023年呈逐年上升趋势（位次数字减小），2024年因广西首年新高考专业组划分出现异常低位12571名（再选不限组），2025年回归至4541名，较2023年微降47名，整体近3年基准稳定在4500名附近；该校在广西物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为109人，2026年计划仍为109人，连续6年计划人数完全持平，无扩招或缩招，招生规模对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第41名，近年排名稳定在40–43名区间，属于国内顶尖211梯队，办学层次稳固；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要关联历史实验室安全事故，非近期重大舆情；抖音综合热度排名第45位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，反映报考关注度尚可；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，系统科学A+、交通运输工程A、信息与通信工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、土木工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，在211高校中实力突出，对相关工科专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等该校核心招生专业大类社会热度持续偏高（2024年均为高热推荐/推荐），工科报考意愿旺盛；广西2026年物理类考生约26.9万人，较2025年增加约8500人（+3.3%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；北京交通大学位于北京市，属一线城市高校，对广西考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在广西物理类招生占比稳定，近年无显著变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近3年稳定在4500名附近、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生增加约3.3%加剧竞争、工科专业热度持续偏高等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年基准小幅后移。预测最低位次约4591名，波动区间4091–5091名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 6693 → 4890 → 4494 → 12571 → 4541. From 2021 to 2023, there was a gradual upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In 2024, due to Guangxi's first year of the new Gaokao with subject group division, an abnormally low ranking of 12571 appeared (for the group with no re-selection restrictions). In 2025, it returned to 4541, a slight decrease of 47 places compared to 2023. Overall, the baseline has been stable around 4500 in the past three years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi was 109 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 109 students, with the number completely unchanged for six consecutive years, indicating no expansion or contraction, and the enrollment scale has no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 41st, with recent rankings stable in the 40–43 range, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities with a solid academic foundation. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 Gaokao cycle is slightly negative, mainly related to historical laboratory safety incidents, not recent major public opinion. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 45th (relatively popular), with short video exposure at an upper-medium level, reflecting moderate attention from applicants. No obvious records of enrollment gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in Systems Science, A in Transportation Engineering, A in Information and Communication Engineering, A- in Computer Science and Technology, A- in Civil Engineering, and A- in Management Science and Engineering, totaling six disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating outstanding strength among 211 universities and strong appeal for related engineering majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering at this university continue to have high social popularity (all rated as highly recommended/recommended in 2024), with strong willingness to apply for engineering majors. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangxi is approximately 269,000, an increase of about 8,500 (+3.3%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Guangxi examinees. The university's enrollment proportion for Physics Category in Guangxi has been stable, with no significant changes in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the historical rankings have been stable around 4500 in the past three years, the 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province has increased by about 3.3% intensifying competition, and the popularity of engineering majors continues to be high, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly downward from the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4591, with a fluctuation range of 4091–5091.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4091–5091, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Category, Transportation Category, Automation Category) as the main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Zhan Tianyou Class, Computer Science Category) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4091), one can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年扩招20%缓解竞争、本省历史类考生增加约3.3%部分抵消扩招效应、文科经管类专业热度偏高等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年基准小幅后移。预测最低位次约1427名，波动区间1213–1641名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were approximately 1049 → 1148 → 1224 → 1342 → 1247. Overall, there is a fluctuating downward trend, with rankings decreasing year by year from 2021 to 2024 (ranking numbers increasing), and a slight rebound in 2025 to 1247, about 95 places earlier than 2024. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is approximately 1049–1342. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi was 7 students in 2021 → 8 in 2022 → 9 in 2023 → 10 in 2024 → 10 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. In 2026, the plan increases to 12 students, an expansion of 2 students (+20%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science ranking approximately 41st, with a strong brand effect in liberal arts admissions. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (history laboratory accident), but it mainly relates to science and engineering, with limited impact on liberal arts applications. Douyin popularity is hot, overall attention is moderate. Among the university's liberal arts-related disciplines, Management Science and Engineering is rated A-, Applied Economics (not individually rated but the Economics and Management Experimental Class is relatively strong), providing some support for liberal arts economics and management majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Accounting/Finance/Auditing and other popular liberal arts majors are socially hot or recommended. In 2026, Guangxi has approximately 123,000 History Category examinees, an increase of about 3,900 (+3.3%) compared to 2025, partially offsetting the expansion benefit. Beijing, as a first-tier city, has strong appeal to liberal arts examinees. The university's enrollment proportion for History Category in Guangxi has slightly increased in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the 20% expansion in 2026 alleviating competition, the approximately 3.3% increase in local History Category examinees partially offsetting the expansion effect, and the high popularity of liberal arts economics and management majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1427, with a fluctuation range of 1213–1641.

- Law.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1213–1641, note that this university only offers two majors in History Category: Law and Liberal Arts Experimental Class. Both majors had the same admission ranking in 2025 (1247). It is recommended to prioritize the Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Economics and Management Talent Pilot Class) as the main choice, with Law as a parallel choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<1213), you can safely apply to any major.
